productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Prophecy Navy Blue Short
description: CompositionDark navy and royal blue shorts made of 100% polyester, with welt pockets, drawcord elastic waist, embroidered logo on the left and adidas Essentials 3-Stripes along the length of the legsFittingComfortWash careWash using water less than 30degree C heatDo not soakDo not tumble dryDo not bleachDry in shadeFlat dryCool ironWith this ClimaCool enabled shorts, you can conveniently ignore the heat and keep your focus right where it needs to be: on the finish line. A combination of performance fabrics, open mesh and ventilation channels to keep cool air flowing in and, heat and sweat flowing out, you can stay dry and comfortable, performing at your peak in even the most heated competition. While the soft and broad elastic waist band sits snugly, the royal blue strips on the sides allow free and flexible movement. The drawstrings on the inside allow you to create a customised Fit, while the deep side pockets can hold your essentials, including an iPod, when you're on the move. The discreet black mesh pattern add a stylish touch to the shorts. Pair it with a ClimaCool t-shirt from adidas and achieve maximum performance. Model's statistics1.
